Achievements.Name: Greed!

Achievements.Name: Nowhere to hide
Achievements.Description: Complete a level having collected all of the secrets in that level

Achievements.Name: Half the secrets
Achievements.Description: Complete a level after having picked up at least half of all the secrets in the game

Achievements.Name: Sherlock
Achievements.Description: Pick up all the secrets in the game and complete the level you're on

Achievements.Name: First steps
Achievements.Description: Complete the first level of the game

Achievements.Name: Ship Ahoy!
Achievements.Description: Get to the second world of the game

Achievements.Name: Robots
Achievements.Description: Get to the third world of the game

Achievements.Name: Defeat Mustacho
Achievements.Description: Get to Mustacho's lair and defeat him

Achievements.Name: Fleetfooted
Achievements.Description: Complete a level faster than the allotted time

Achievements.Name: Speed demon
Achievements.Description: Beat the speed run time on all levels

Achievements.Name: Done and done
Achievements.Description: Complete the game having found all pickups and secrets, and completed every speed run
